headlines.description: Borussia Dortmund slumped to a 2-1 defeat at Augsburg in the Bundesliga and were left with 10 men as they suffered a second defeat in five days.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dortmund lose again as pressure grows on Sahin

video.headline: Augsburg ease relegation fear after defeating Dortmund

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (FC Augsburg vs. Borussia Dortmund - Game Highlights) 2024/10/26 ESHEET

headlines.description: Bayer Leverkusen twice took the lead but conceded a 90th minute equaliser to draw 2-2 at Werder Bremen on Saturday despite striker Victor Boniface, back after being involved in a car crash last week, getting on the scoresheet.
headlines.shortLinkText: Leverkusen drop more points in draw at Werder
